title: Stage 4 overview: base view plus overlay API
description: Add render(model,{baseView,overlays}) path so overview base view and auth/dataflow/boundary/permission/validation overlays combine without reparsing.
triage_notes: Stage 4 advanced by TASK-004. baseView+overlays now performs semantic projection composition for overview/zone using the same model without reparsing; auth/dataflow/boundary/validation flat views share the projection logic; core 3d fallback is registered. Remaining TASK-002 work: richer permission overlay edges, overlay conflict priority/inspector, RenderResult overlay controls, and engine/custom-element integration.
